entities.name: positions.py

entities.context: A placeholder for the specific domain of a position.

entities.context: A placeholder for the title of a position.

entities.context: Text providing insights related to a position.

entities.context: A sub-claim added to an existing position.

entities.context: Reference to an item in a content library used as evidence.

entities.context: Reference to another position that supports a current one.

entities.context: Placeholder for a source conversation identifier.

Used to define the title of a position.
